scores.justification: Related work covers the differentiable-design axis on the merits (QDO, SQcircuit line, SQuADDS, photonics inverse-design genus, JAX-FEM, TensorGalerkin, libCEED foil, V&V tradition), litsearch-substrate-backed; 57 complete entries, zero unused; the v5 misquotation of the closest prior work is repaired to an accurate unquoted paraphrase.

scores.fix: Resolve the TODO(operator) repository URL and archival DOI so the committed artifacts are reachable by an arXiv reader.
scores.justification: Every number traces to a committed artifact with pinning tests and full hardware/commit provenance — the new Table 3 footnote closes the last traceability gap — but the repository URL/DOI footnote remains TODO(operator), so no stable public artifact reference exists from the preprint alone.

The ~250-word abstract states the gap, the capability, the honest negatives, and the credential; contributions are one sentence per item on the first pages — a triaging arXiv reader gets the claim and its boundary immediately. Unchanged by the surgical diff.

physics.comp-ph remains correct for a differentiable-solver methods paper with a strengthened quant-ph cross-list case; the abstract's framing matches comp-ph reader expectations for solver/method papers. Unchanged by the surgical diff.

findings.rationale: arXiv readers triage reproducibility on a working repository link; the footnote defers it to submission time.
findings.suggested_fix: Operator supplies the repository URL and archival DOI before submission.
